items.title: Login service-parameter applicability tables
items.reason: The retrieved login procedures repeatedly reference tables 150 and 155 as defining applicability of service parameters to Fabric Login and N_Port Login, but those tables were not retrieved in this evidence pass, so their exact unit role cannot be confirmed here.

evidence_refs.quote: The Service Parameters are as specified for F_Port Login in 6.6.  The applicability of the Service Pa-
rameters to Fabric Login are given in tables 150 and 155.
quence.  The N_Port Service Parameters are as specified  in 6.6.  The applicability of the Service Pa-
rameters to N_Port Login are given in tables 150 and 155.
